title: No Wight Music
description: This mod simply disabled the wight's pre music form goety mod,replacing it with very soft white noise.
body:
Tired of the Wight's deafening entrance music shattering your eardrums—and your immersion—every time it spawns? This simple tweak is for you.

The mod simply and replaces the Wight's(from Goety) loud spawn BGM with a subtle, low-volume white noise. 

Special thanks for k1sak1 for packing this mod!
